chunks.title: Promise of Restoration
chunks.reason: Yahweh declares a new relationship with Israel and promises future rebuilding.

chunks.title: Gathering from Exile
chunks.reason: A call to the nations to witness Yahweh's gathering of the remnant with joy.

chunks.title: Rachel's Comfort and Ephraim's Return
chunks.reason: Transition from Rachel's weeping to Yahweh's tender address to Ephraim.

chunks.title: Call to Return and Promise of Satisfaction
chunks.reason: Instruction to return to the cities followed by a vision of satisfaction.

chunks.title: Replanting and Personal Responsibility
chunks.reason: Promise to sow the house of Israel and Judah and end the proverb about sour grapes.

chunks.title: The New Covenant
chunks.reason: Definition of the internal covenant where God's law is written on hearts.

chunks.title: Certainty of the Covenant
chunks.reason: Yahweh uses cosmic order to guarantee Israel's continued existence.

chunks.title: Rebuilt Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Detailed description of the boundaries and holiness of the renewed city.
